Employee PII observed in payroll export: Mr. Nguyen Van Khoi (HR No. HB-2026-004), CCCD 079123456789, Passport VN-P9876543, residence: 12/5 Alley 63, Truong Chinh Street, Tan Binh District, Ho Chi Minh City
Note: Template fields like “Contact person name” and “National ID _______” are generic placeholders and not PII until completed
Securities MNPI scope: draft prospectus (no HOSE code assigned) includes unaudited Q3 forecasts and proposed primary issuance of VND 420,000,000,000; non-public until SSC acknowledgement of receipt
Additional MNPI: confidential term sheet for acquisition of Viet Mekong Seeds Co., Ltd. at an indicative VND 95,000,000,000 consideration, subject to SSC clearance and VSDC settlement procedures
Communications control: circulate MNPI only via company email and encrypted channels; exception—public helpline 1900 0000 in HR policy is not sensitive and may remain in open documents
Tax compliance: filings include dependent branch MST 0319123456-001; verify vendor VAT/TINs—example “0123456789” appears invalid and should not be ingested into the supplier master
KYC files include direct contacts (e.g., +84 28 7777 8888; khachhang@hb-agro.vn); treat such phone/email data as PII per Decree 13 and mask in any external deliverables
Bank reconciliation: transfer memo “FT 2026-05-28 14:22 Ref HBX-PO-00073” is contextual only; the associated account number above is a direct identifier requiring redaction in shared files
External counsel: Dr. Pham Quoc Dan (dan.pham@lotus-legal.vn) to review SSC Form CBTT-01; do not transmit employee ID scans or CCCD images via unsecured links
